The Restaurant

More Than Dinner.
An Italian Experience.

Murano by Ferraro combines Chef Ferraro's creations, exceptional wines, and authentic Italian hospitality to create evenings worth remembering.

Venetian tradition · South Florida table

The Experience

A Dining Journey
Unlike Any Other

"Murano by Ferraro gives you emotions throughout your Dining Experience."

We offer a full bar featuring South Florida's finest cocktails, artfully crafted by our talented bartenders. Complemented by an award-winning wine list recognized by Wine Spectator, Murano is where exceptional food, fine wine, and special cocktails combine to create unforgettable memories.

Book a Table

01

Venetian Cuisine

Chef-crafted Italian seafood dishes rooted in the traditions of Venice, elevated with modern refinement.

02

Intimate Atmosphere

Warm lighting, a distinguished wine cellar, and an atmosphere crafted for memorable evenings.

03

Award-Winning Wine List

A curated Wine Spectator–recognized list featuring prestigious bottles from Dal Forno to Sassicaia.

"

Igor Ferraro

Chef · Owner

"Born into a culinary dynasty in Venice — steeped in the traditions of Italian cooking since the age of 10."

Inspired by the lagoon of his homeland, Chef Ferraro showcases traditional Italian seafood dishes infused with a touch of modernity. Today regarded as one of the finest Italian chefs in South Florida — known for intimacy, craft, and refined hospitality.

About Chef Ferraro

Guest Reviews

A Dining Experience Guests Remember

"My family and I dined at Murano and I'm still thinking about it a week later. Chef Igor Ferraro has created something truly special. Five stars, no hesitation."

Kirk Englehardt

Google Review · Local Guide

"RUN to this restaurant. Each bite was pure joy. From the Lobster bisque, to the pastas, fish, and tiramisu — the food couldn't have been better and the service was excellent."

BreAnne Butterworth

Google Review · Local Guide

"From the name alone you sense the Venetian inspiration — and it delivers completely. Elegant, beautifully curated, and unlike anything else in South Florida."

Maria Luisa Luzzu
